Count.description: Number of items returned in this page

SizePage.description: Page size used for this response

TotalItems.description: Total number of matching items across all pages

Computations.description: Calculated amounts for the given query parameters

AmountSubtotal.description: Sum of subtotal amounts across all matching lines

AmountTotal.description: Sum of total amounts across all matching lines

IdSubscription.description: Related subscription internal identifier, if any

IdFeature.description: Related feature internal identifier, if any

ReferenceFeature.description: Related feature shared identifier, if any

LabelLocalized.description: Label of this line, localized in the billing language

PricingLocalized.description: Formatted price for display, localized in the billing language (e.g. €600.00)

AmountTotal.description: Total line amount in cents (negative = credit)

AmountSubtotal.description: Subtotal line amount in cents (negative = credit, before tax)

Currency.description: Billing currency (ISO 4217). Defined at the segment level — cannot be updated

DateMove.description: Value date of the debit or credit, for a punctual entry (mutually exclusive with DatePeriodStart/DatePeriodEnd)

DatePeriodStart.description: Period start of the debit or credit, for a period-related entry such as a subscription fee (mutually exclusive with DateMove)

DatePeriodEnd.description: Period end of the debit or credit, for a period-related entry such as a subscription fee (mutually exclusive with DateMove)

TypeLine.description: Type of the balance line entry (TypeLine)

KeyCharge.description: Related charge, indicating the nature of the product/service/fee and used to calculate the tax

QuantityReported.description: Quantity reported to the customer — informational, displayed on the invoice

QuantityBilled.description: Quantity billed to the customer — displayed on the future invoice

Target.description: Identifies the field or resource at fault
